case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. VALLIARE WOLRIDGE et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT WOLRIDGE, VALLIARE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLRIDGE, VALLIARE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 250 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
